creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
dikshie, 10.02.09, 16:05h CET:

> herewith i attached proposed Makefile for
> rrdtool.
> please review it.

The PLIST_ARGS/PLIST_SUB are superfluous here. Other than that, it looks
OK to me. However: Have you had a look at the output of 'ulimit -a' and
played with the limits a bit? Maybe you don't need to disable mmap at all?

Regards,
Stefan
